title: voyria primuloides
intro: Voyria primuloides, also known as the Monkey Flower, is a species of flowering plant in the Gentianaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of gentianine and other alkaloids. Traditionally, the plant has been used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, fever, and respiratory infections, thanks to its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. Voyria primuloides can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to alleviate symptoms of colds, coughs, and other respiratory conditions.
